hindiTranslation: यह देही प्रत्यक्ष नहीं दीखता, यह चिन्तनका विषय नहीं है और यह निर्विकार कहा जाता है ।  अतः इस देहीको ऐसा जानकर शोक नहीं करना चाहिये ॥
englishTranslation: It is unseen, beyond thought, and said to be unchanged. Therefore, knowing it this way, you should not grieve.
essence: What is deepest in you was never available for loss.
speaker: Krishna
